snippet.title: Check Telugu Movie Official Trailer | Nithiin | Rakul Preet | Priya Varrier | Chandra Sekhar Yeleti
snippet.description:
Bhavya Creations Presents the Official Trailer of CHECK. 

Check is all set for a Grand Release in theaters from February 26th 2021.

Movie Details:
Written and Directed by Chandra Sekhar Yeleti
Produced by V. Ananda Prasad
Starring:  Nithiin, Rakul Preeth Singh,  Priya Prakash Varrier,  Simran Choudary,  Posani Krishna Murali, Sai Chand, Murali Sharma, Harsha Vardhan, Sampath Raj,  Rohit Pathak, Virendra Chauhan, Chaitanya Krishna, Gururaj Manepalli, Raina Rao, Karthik Ratnam, Praveen Yendamuri, Krishna Teja, Aziz Nazar, C.V.L. Narasimha Rao, Meka Ramakrishna

Director of Photography: Rahul Shrivatsav

Sound Design: Nagarjuna thalapalli
Music Director: Kalyani Malik
Keyboard programming: Ebenezer Paul
Mix and Master at Prasad labs
Sound Engineer: E. Radha krishna D.F TECH
Assistant Engineer:  Jeevan Kumar CH
Associate Director: Kunduru Aditya Reddy
Direction Department:  Pramod Gadharaveni, Bharadwaj Vadapalli, Kiran Raju Akula, Vishnu Vardhan Sapineni, Srinivas Rao Mateti, Sai Srestha Kamakolla

Cameraman Team:

Chief Associate Cameraman: Satish Reddy Masam
Associate cameraman: Raju Gadde, Navadeer Mudusu
Assistant Cameraman: Madan Kumar Mohan, Arunkumar Adharsunday

Still’s – M Anand Raj
Assistant stills – Gunda Vamsi Krishna 

Editor: Sanal Anirudhan

Production Designer: Vivek Annamalai

Art Department:   nagu, kalakeya Karthik, Prasanna kumar, e.govind, chidipalli shankar, naresh
Art assistants:  sakriti, aila Aparna, Sudheer macharla, ar. Jyothi, satish, Krishna kolli, satwik kangala 

Action: Ravi varma

Additional Action: Murali G, Shankkar. U

Lyricist: Srimani

Choreography: Sekhar V.J

Dubbing: Venu Babu Chundi, D. Pundari Nayak (Ramanaidu Studios)

Costume Designer: Neeraja kona

Dialogues – Additional Screenplay: M. Naresh reddy

Production Managers: K. Ramesh Babu, Peddi Srikanth

Production controller:  P.L.M. Khan

DI: Prasad Labs 

VFX: Chaya visual Effects

VFX Supervisor: Nagaraju sappa

Colorist: Premraj S

P.R.O: Pulagam Chinnarayana

Marketing: -

snippet.title: The Girl On The Train | Official Trailer | Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari & Kirti Kulhari
snippet.description:
The journey has begun and there's no turning back. Are you in?

A bright city, a dull morning and a curious girl on the train. When a voyeuristic divorcee fixates on the lives of a perfect couple from afar, she soon gets embroiled in a murder mystery that unfolds revealing truths about her own life. Get on board a thrilling experience with Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kirti Kulhari and Avinash Tiwary. Catch Ribhu Dasgupta's The Girl On The Train on 26th February, only on Netflix.

Official Teaser: https://youtu.be/3iH0YehfMB0

Follow Netflix India on:
Website: https://www.netflix.com/

snippet.description:
Hiiii all ❤ THIS IS OUR FIRST INTERNATIONAL TRIP TO DUBAI. We travelled in emirates and its one of the best experience... The ambiance, hospitality and everything was so nice.... We tried to show everything to you guys so that you will also feel like traveling with us... So the dubai series starts here and you will see alot of videos in dubai from today!!  Don't miss anything coz its all fun.. 
Make sure you subscribe to us and share our videos with your friends so that they can enjoy ❤😍

Our Official Insta Page - https://www.instagram.com/ramwithjaanu.official/?hl=en

snippet.title: નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીએ અમિત શાહના પુત્ર વિશે શું કહ્યું? BBC Exclusive
snippet.description:
#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi 

ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીને લઈને તમામ પક્ષોએ તૈયારી શરૂ કરી દીધી છે. 

નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીના પુત્રી સોનલ મોદી આ ચૂંટણીમાં ઉમેદવારી નોંધાવી રહ્યા છે. 

બીબીસી સંવાદદાતા તેજસ વૈદ્યએ પ્રહ્લાદભાઈ સાથે વાત કરી. 

વીડિયો : ઉત્સવ ગજ્જર 

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S

snippet.description:
Uppena Movie Trailer Announcement on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena is a latest Telugu movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi, Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar, Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

 Uppena is all set for a Grand Release on February 12th.

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario | Promo Video | Jump Cuts 2.0 | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Have you had a savage ghost moment? Jump Cuts presents a promo video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. Later, he gets a call from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario.” Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts

___________________________________

snippet.title: ही एक ग्रेवी बनवुन ठेवा आणि हवं तेव्हा हॉटेलसारखी कोणतीही डिश फक्त 10 मिनिटात बनवा/All purpose gravy
snippet.description:
In this video I will share recipe of restaurant style all purpose gravy, using this gravy you can make many dishes within 10-15 mins and tastes awesome.

या विडियो मध्ये आपण पाहणार आहोत हॉटेल मध्ये वापरली जाणारी ग्रेवी जी वापरून बर्‍याच प्रकारच्या डिश आपण 10-15 मिनिटात बनवू शकतो.. 

Ingredients / साहित्य ( 4 restaurant style dishes / 4 डिश साठी) 

Tomato / टोमॅटो 500gms 
Onion / कांदे 500gms 
Ginger / आले 50gms
Garlic / लसुण 50gms
Pumpkin seeds / मगज बी 50gms
Cadhew / काजू 25-30
Oil / तेल 6-7 tbsp
Bay leaf / तमालपत्र 4-5
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 2 inch
Black cardamom / मसाला वेलची 1
Green cardamom / हिरव्या वेलची 6-7
Cloves / लवंगा 7-8
Cumin seeds / जीरे 1 tbsp
Salt / मीठ 
Corriender powder / धणे पूड 2 tsp
Sugar / साखर 2 tsp
Red chilly powder / लाल मिरची पावडर 1&1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1 tsp

#allpurposegravy
#hotelsarkhigravy
#ग्रेवीएकसब्जियांअनेक
#ग्रेवीएकभाज्याअनेक 
#gravyeksabjiyaanek
#allpurposegravy
#testaurantstylegravy
#saritaskitchen

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീനിൽ അലക്കിയ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർ ഈ രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടാതിരിക്കാൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കണം. ഷെയർ
snippet.description:
തിരക്കേറിയ നമ്മുടെ ജീവിതത്തിനിടയിൽ വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീൻ ഇന്ന് ഒഴിവാക്കാനാകില്ല. പക്ഷെ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട ഒരു കാര്യം.. പതിവായി വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീനിൽ അലക്കിയ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് ചില രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടാൻ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്. ഈ അവസ്ഥ ഉണ്ടാകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ ?
0:00 Start
2:20  രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ?

snippet.description:
सोनी मराठीवरील महाराष्ट्राची हास्यजत्रा कार्यक्रमात गौरव, समीर आणि  प्रसादचं धमाकेदार स्किट बघायला मिळणार आहे. गौरवला टक्कल पडल्याचा समीरला भलताच आनंद झालाय, पहा या स्किटची खास झलक,पाहायला विसरू नका महाराष्ट्राची हास्य जत्रा बुधवार आणि गुरुवार रात्री ९ वाजता फक्त सोनी मराठीवर .

snippet.title: Angana Morey | Shreya Ghoshal & Soumyadeep Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Shreya Ghoshal teams up with her talented brother, Soumyadeep Ghoshal to compose and produce this intense yet intricate electronic pop ode to the feeling of longing, titled “Angana Morey”. 
Sung by the inimitable Shreya Ghoshal, Angana Morey, is rooted, earthy and intense. Shreya makes her presence felt through her idiomatic phrasing, penning words that invoke the bittersweet feeling of longing and reunion. Shreya’s lyrics and singing, transport you into a satisfying trance, while Soumyadeep switches to top gear with his intelligent production, fusing electronic layers with the magnanimous Budapest Symphony Orchestra, guitars, tabla and distinguished flute parts that all converge into a dramatic confluence!
The song is Shreya’s contemporary interpretation of the girl longing for her beloved, deeply in love for each other, but away from her. The raag, the composition and the music are encapsulating and transport you like a whirlwind from one universe to another, visually captured by the choreography and life like projections in the video.

Singer, Composer, Lyricist : Shreya Ghoshal
Music Produced by : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Additional Production, Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Tabla : Nitin Mitta
Flute : Rajeev Prasanna
Guitars : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Mixed and Mastered by Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio, Mumbai 
Mix Assistant Vatsal Chevli

Directed by Nazeef Mohammed
Edited by Allan Fernandes 
DOP : Ronnel Parmar
Conceptualisation by Nazeef Mohammed and Allan Fernandes
Motion Graphics Director : Mayur Sharma
3D Artist : Parth Reshamwala
Face Mapping : Prashant Bhikadia
Illustrator : Robin Chakraborty
Graded by Mayur Sharma and Nitesse
Offline Edit by Sagar Parikh
Assistant Editor : Yogesh Chandravanshi
Additional Artwork : Gayathri Sankaran

Choreography : Shakti Mohan 
Assistant Choreography : Somya Kautia, NrityaShakti
Dancers : Mukta Nagpal and Parth Sethi , NrityaShakti 

Production Team : Parth Shah, Renish Kotodia, Rohan Shetty, Deep Dave and Meher Singh
Project Coordinators : Smrithi Menon and Khushboo Gugle
Video Conceptualised , Produced and Post Produced at BToS Productions

Distributed by : Believe Digital

Lyrics :-
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan angana morey 
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan... Angana Morey.. Angana Morey..

(Music)

Raag preet ka tumne sunaya 
Saat suron mein mohe sajaya 

Tere moh mein aise
Man bheetar mehak rahi hun

Is peedh ko samjho piya 
Haan is peedh ko samjho piya
Jiya ab na maane 

Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan

(Music)

Aao.. Sajan aao.. aaa..
Sajan laagi.. 
Laagi mohe jog piya.. 
Sajan... 
Aao sajan angana morey..
Aao sajan..

snippet.title: Rogue Queen Takes It All (Clash Of Clans Season Challenges)
snippet.description:
It's an all new season of Season Challenges and Gold Pass full of exciting tasks, rewards, and perks! The all new Rogue Queen Hero Skin awaits you! 


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

snippet.title: तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat chaturthi | Sankashti Chaturthi Ki katha
snippet.description:
This Video shows two stories of Til Chauth vrat or . Til Chauth is also called Sankashti Chaturthi, Sakat Chauth, Sankat Chaturthi. Til Chauth vrat is observed on the Chaturthi of Krishna Paksha of Magh maas. Til Kutte is offered to Shri Ganesh Ji and Chauth Mata on the day of sakat choth.   Tilakuta is made by crushing sesame and jaggery together.
Women observe this fast for the longevity and success of their husband and son. This fast destroys all kinds of crises and provides happiness and prosperity.
On this day of Sakat chauth, women keep a fast for the whole day and worship Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata in the evening. On observing the moon at night, the fast is completed. Let's watch the  Til Chauth Vrat Katha and pray to lord ganesh and sakata mata.

तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat Chauth Katha
आज मैं आप सभी के समक्ष तिल चौथ अथवा  संकट चौथ व्रत की  दो कथाएं  प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। तिल चौथ का व्रत माघ मास की कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी को किया जाता हैं| इस दिन श्री गणेश जी व चौथ माता  को तिल कुट्टे का भोग लगाया जाता हैं |  तिलकुटा  तिल और गुड़ को  एक साथ कूटकर बनाया जाता है।
यह व्रत स्त्रिया अपने पति व पुत्र की दीर्घायु और सफलता के लिए करती हैं |  यह व्रत सभी प्रकार के संकटों  का नाश करता है और सुख समृद्धि प्रदान करता है।
इस दिन स्त्रिया  पूरा दिन व्रत रख कर शाम को गणेश जी व चौथ माता का पूजन  पूजन  करती हैं।  रात को चन्द्रमा को अर्ध्य  देने  पर व्रत पूर्ण हो जाता है। आइए शुरू करते हैं तिल चौथ की पहली कथा...

#tilchauthvratkatha  #sankatChauthVratKatha #ganesh  #chauthmata

snippet.title: Highlights - ATK Mohun Bagan 3-2 Kerala Blasters - Match 78 | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
ATK Mohun Bagan pulled off a stunning comeback, beating Kerala Blasters 3-2 at the Fatorda Stadium. Gary Hooper's first-half screamer and Costa Nhamoinesu 51st minute goal put Kibu Vicuna's side in firm control of the contest. But ATKMB's new signing Marcelinho, reignited hope with a debut goal and Roy Krishna's brace helped complete a comeback and seal a famous win for Antonio Lopez Habas' side!

What was your favourite moment from #ATKMBKBFC? Let us know in the comments below 👇 

#HeroISL #LetsFootball

localized.title: Highlights - ATK Mohun Bagan 3-2 Kerala Blasters - Match 78 | Hero ISL 2020-21
localized.description:
ATK Mohun Bagan pulled off a stunning comeback, beating Kerala Blasters 3-2 at the Fatorda Stadium. Gary Hooper's first-half screamer and Costa Nhamoinesu 51st minute goal put Kibu Vicuna's side in firm control of the contest. But ATKMB's new signing Marcelinho, reignited hope with a debut goal and Roy Krishna's brace helped complete a comeback and seal a famous win for Antonio Lopez Habas' side!

What was your favourite moment from #ATKMBKBFC? Let us know in the comments below 👇

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Saiyaan Ji"; a brand new song in the voice of “Yo Yo Honey Singh” & "Neha Kakkar" featuring Yo Yo Honey Singh & Nushrratt Bharuccha. The lyrics of the new song are penned by Yo Yo Honey Singh, Lil Golu, Hommie Dilliwala & music produced by Yo Yo Honey Singh. The video is directed by Mihir Gulati.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, February 2, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 9 (SN9) – the second high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN9 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN9’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s second high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की | Episode 57 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Since Virendra had forced Vaibhav to get married to Priyashi, Vaibhav gets infuriated and plans to deceive Virendra in business. Tune in to this sneak peek of the upcoming episode to know more.
#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: Union Budget 2021-22 Highlights And Analysis
snippet.description:
Presenting the Union Budget for 2021-22, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman said that the Budget proposals for this financial year rest on six pillars — health and well-being, physical and financial capital and infrastructure, inclusive development for aspirational India, reinvigorating human capital, innovation and R&D, and 'Minimum Government, Maximum Governance'.

𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫📢📢📢
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ  പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ  ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക👍.

snippet.title: Dhee 13 | Kings vs Queens | 10th February 2021 | Latest Promo | ETV Telugu
snippet.description:
#Dhee13KingsvsQueens #Dhee13 #ETVTelugu #ETVWin #SudigaaliSudheer #Rashmi  #PradeepMachiraju #HyperAadi #SekharMaster  #MounikaPilli #Poorna #Priyamani

దక్షణ భారతదేశంలో అతిపెద్ద డాన్స్ రియాలిటీ షో "ఢీ".... 12 సీజన్స్ ముగించుకొని ఇప్పుడు  ఢీ కింగ్స్ v/s క్వీన్స్ ("ఢీ" 13వ సీజన్) గా మిమ్మల్ని అలరించడానికి వేరే లెవల్ ఎంటర్ టైన్ మెంట్ ని అందించడానికి సిద్దమైంది. కింగ్స్ టీమ్ కి సుడిగాలి సుధీర్ & హైపర్ ఆది, క్వీన్స్ టీమ్ కి రేష్మి & టిక్ టాక్ స్టార్ దీపికా... జడ్జెస్ గా శేఖర్ మాస్టర్ గారు హీరోయిన్ ప్రియమణి వ్యవహరిస్తారు.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1166 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Heer misses Virat and the bond that they shared. While trying to catch a glimpse of him, Heer comes face-to-face with Virat! Tune in to this sneak peek of the upcoming episode for more.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Budget 2021 HIGHLIGHTS - The key Take Away -  CNN News18
snippet.description:
Watch the key highlights of Budget 2021 presented by the FM Nirmala Sitharaman.

Budget 2021 Highlights:

Contingency Fund of India to be enhanced to Rs 30,000 cr.

Propose to discontinue loans to FCI. Have provided for support in budget.

15th Finance Commission reconfirming share of States at 41%.

National Research Foundation to be set up at Rs. 50,000 crores to strengthen the research ecosystem

Union Budget 2021 allows NRIs to operate OPCs in India

#CNNNews18 #Budget2021 #BudgetWithNews18 

Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman presents the Union Budget 2021 in Parliament. Sitharaman has raised hopes, going into the Budget event, by stating that it will "be a Budget like never before."

Watch all the latest updates on Union Budget 2021 LIVE: FM Nirmala Sitharaman to present budget at 11 AM.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: 5 Ki Baat: Haryana के Jind में किसानों की Mahapanchayat
snippet.description:
भारतीय किसान यूनियन (BKU) के नेता राकेश टिकैत (Rakesh Tikait) केंद्र के तीन नए कृषि कानूनों (Farm Law 2020) के खिलाफ आंदोलन के समर्थन में आज हरियाणा के जींद जिले में किसानों की महापंचायत (Kisan Mahapanchayat) में शामिल हुए. इस महापंचायत में काफी भीड़ जुटी. किसान संगठनों के कई बड़े नेता भी शामिल हुए. किसानों के इस महापंचायत में तमाम किसान संगठनों की तरफ से 5 प्रस्ताव को पारित किया गया. इसके बाद राकेश टिकैत ने महापंचायत को संबोधित भी किया. उन्होंने कहा कि, “आप लोगों का साथ चाहिए. दिल्ली में किलेबंदी की जा रही है. जब-जब राजा डरता है तो किलेबंदी करता है. कंटीले तार और कीलें लगाई जा रही है. जनता को कीलें गाड़कर रोकने की कोशिश की जा रही है. लेकिन जनता कीलों पर से निकल जाएगी. अभी तो कानून वापसी की बात की है. गद्दी वापसी की बात पर क्या करोगे?”

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें : https://www.facebook.com/NDTVIndia
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें : https://twitter.com/ndtvindia

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

snippet.description:

തുടക്കത്തിൽ പറഞ്ഞ സ്പെയർ പാർട്സുകൾ ഓൺലൈൻ വാങ്ങാവുന്ന കമ്പനിയുടെ വിശദ വിവരങ്ങൾ ഇതാ:

ഗൂഗിൾ പ്ളേസ്റ്റോർ: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.opsway.boodmo
 
ടാറ്റ ഹാരിയറിന്റെ 6-7 സീറ്റർ മോഡൽ സഫാരി എന്ന പേരിൽ എത്തുകയാണ്.പേര് അങ്ങനെയാണെങ്കിലും പഴയ സഫാരിയുമായി പുലബന്ധം പോലുമില്ല പുതിയതിന്.ഹാരിയറിൽ 3 നിര സീറ്റുകൾ വന്നെന്നു മാത്രം.

Instagram:www.instagram.com/baijunnair 
Email:baijunnair@gmail.com

snippet.title: Realme X7 Unboxing & First Look - True Game Changer!!! Giveaway🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Enter here: https://gleam.io/gRn3n/tg-realme-x7-giveaway
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse Realme X7 Smartphone ke baare mein baat ki hai aur share ki hai iski Unboxing aur ek First Look. Realme X7 mein 6.4" FHD+ AMOLED Screen hai Punch Hole ke saath mein aur isme hai Mediatek Dimensity 800U Octa Core 5G processor Dual 5G ke options lata hua saath mein hai 6GB/8GB LPDDR4x RAM aur 128GB ki Internal Storage. Realme X7 mein Triple Rear camera setup 64MP Primary + 8MP Ultrawide + 2MP Macro ke saath, aur saath mein 16MP ka front facing camera. Realme X7 mein 4310mAh ki battery hai 50W SuperDart Flash Charger ke saath mein. Yaha India mein Realme X7 ke saath X7 Pro bhi launch karne waali hai, jaha aap sabhi ke liye meri taraf ek Realme X7 ka ek giveaway contest bhi hai. snippet.title: Gajendra Verma | Mushkil Badi | Summary - Chapter 01
snippet.description:
Official Video of Gajendra Verma's - Mushkil Badi  from the Album "Summary" - Chapter 01

"Summary - A Musical Series" is a romantic tale. The story starts with the first song and ends with the fifth song. A musical series on the summary of love taking romance to a whole new level along with the most beloved pair essayed by singer Gajendra Verma and beautiful Manasi Moghe. 

Subscribe to the Gajendra Verma Channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances
http://bit.ly/SubscribeToGajendraVerma

Listen on:
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-iTunes
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Gaana
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Spotify
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Hungama
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Raaga

See more official videos from Gajendra Verma here: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0KNk-Joi-NM&list=PLTGJmH_RBpkEI18DUASS-BUKBCCcI679u

Connect with Gajendra Verma:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iVermaGajendra
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ivermagajen...
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ivermagajendra

Singer, Lyrics & Music: Gajendra Verma
Mastering: Navneeth Balachanderan

VIDEO CREDITS

Drone Camera: Sinan kılıç
Production Team:  Erhan Caylak & Gizem Demir 
Production Asst: Riad Afandiyev    
Makeup: Tamay Esintimur          
Makeup Asst: Selin Arier 
Makeup (Posters): Anshu Gautam
PR Team: Shruti Dahibavkar & Harish Pednekar
Social Media: Jasmeet Kaur, Bhisham Soni
Agency: Qyuki Digital Media
Record Label: Virtual Planet Music
Virtual Planet Team: Akshay Jain, Krishna Kishore, Preet Bhullar, Mohit Rajyaguru, Sourabh Swami & Amit Kumar

LYRICS:

Tum, tum to bas tum ho tumhari koi baat aur hai….
Main khicha chala aata hun mujh pe na koi jor hai

Music…

Ho.. Tum, tum to bas tum ho tumhari koi baat aur hai….
Main khicha chala aata hu mujh pe na koi jor hai
Tujhe jahan se main chupa lun kahin
O tere sang ghar bana lun kahi
Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...
Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...

Music…

Ye sham hasin hai lekin ye mujhe raas aati nahi
Jo tu door baithi hai kyun mere paas aati nahi
Ye sham hasin hai lekin ye mujhe raas aati nahi
Jo tu door baithi hai kyun mere paas aati nahi
Teri nazar se door ho jaun kahin
Is bheed mein na kho jaun kahin

Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...
Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...

Music…

snippet.description:
Watch the latest Episode of the New Malayalam Serial #SwanthamSujatha that airs on Surya TV.
 
 You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021
   
#SwanthamSujatha #SuryaTV #MalayalamSerial

Swantham Sujatha revolves around Sujatha, a happy home maker, who loves her family and cherishes her life. But her life turns into a roller coaster ride, when she finds her true calling as an RJ after being home bound for years. Follow Sujatha’s story of self awakening , even as she deals with life’s challenges and finds a way around them.

snippet.title: Jethalal को मिला Daya का Letter-Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep3093-2nd February 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/sundar-brings-daya-s-letter-1000106668?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3093: Jethalal Received Daya's letter
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sundar has come to Jethalal's place to give them the good news. Jethalal, Champaklal, and Tapu think it's about Daya coming back but that good news is about Sundar's new business. Everyone in the Gada family is missing Daya so Sundar gives them a letter of Daya. Tapu gets emotional after getting the letter. catch the fun and watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: ആദ്യമായിട്ട് എല്ലാരേയും കൂട്ടി പുറത്തേക്കൊന്ന് പോകാൻ പോയതാ||പക്ഷെ സംഭവിച്ചത് ഫുൾ സീൻ 😔|| PART - 1||
snippet.description:
hai frnds😍
അങ്ങനെ കുറേ വർഷങ്ങൾക്ക് ശേഷം അമ്മയെയും സ്നേഹയെയും എബലിനെയും എല്ലാരേം കൂടെ കൂട്ടി ഒന്ന് കറങ്ങാൻ പോയതാ 😂പക്ഷെ വീട്ടിന്ന് ഇറങ്ങുന്നതിന് മുൻപ് തന്നെ കരച്ചിൽ 😂എന്തായാലും ഇനി അടുപ്പിച്ചു 2 പാർട്ട് ആയിട്ട് വീഡിയോ ഇടുന്നതാണ് 😍അടുത്ത പാർട്ട് കാണാൻ മറക്കല്ലേ സ്നേഹ മോൾക്ക് എന്റെ വക ഒരു surprise gift സ്വർണക്കടയിൽ നിന്ന് മേടിക്കുന്നുണ്ട്.. അതേപോലെ lulu mall ൽ പോയി അതിന്റപ്പുറം സീൻ 😂😂എന്തയാലും 2-3 ദിവസം അടുപ്പിച്ചു ഞാൻ ഈ youtube ൽ തന്നെ കാണും കേട്ടോ 😛😛
@Oru adaar family
.
.
frnds അതേപോലെ ഇതാണ് നമ്മുടെ instagram / facebook അക്കൗണ്ടുകളുടെ ലിങ്ക് ||ഇവിടെ തരുന്ന സപ്പോർട്ട് അവിടേം തരുമെന്ന് വിശ്വസിക്കുന്നു 😍അപ്പോ പിന്നെ നിങ്ങൾ പോയി വീഡിയോ കണ്ടേച്ഛ് വാ 😉

.

snippet.title: Chhor Denge Teaser ► Parampara Tandon | Sachet-Parampara | Nora Fatehi | Ehan Bhat | Releasing 4 Feb
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Chhor Denge"; a brand new song in the voice of “Parampara Tandon" featuring Nora Fatehi & Ehan Bhat. The lyrics of new song are penned by Yogesh Dubey &  music directed by Sachet-Parampara. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira. The full song is set to release on 4 February 2021.

snippet.title: Chithi 2 & Thirumagal Mahasangamam - Full Episode | Part - 1 | 31 Jan 2021 | Sun TV | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Special Episode of Chithi 2 & Thirumagal Mahasangamam, that airs on Sun TV.

#RadikaaSarathkumar #SunTV #Chithi2 #Thirumagal #Chithi2ThirumagalMahasangamam #TamilSerial #Chithi2Serial #Fullepisode #VenbaKavin #KavinVenba #Mahasangamam #Anjali #Raja #RajaAnjali

Chithi 2, is a whole new story., about yet another ‘Chithi’, our kind-hearted and brave-spirited Saradha. Her portrayal of love, forgiveness, sacrifice, fierceness, and perseverance towards her family, through the thick and thin of life, makes one believe in the power of family. Watch and travel along with Saradha’s offbeat family. 

Anjali, a young, bold and daring girl runs a food on wheels with her father while the Raja who belongs to a rich Zamindar family falls in love with Anjali. She questions anyone who wrongs and is always at loggerheads with the Raja’s mother Aishwarya. Anjali challenges Aishwarya that she would marry her son Raja and would become the daughter-in-law of the house.
